title: Mass. family, Worcester woman identified as victims in deadly Virginia bus crash
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Four members of a Greenfield family and a Worcester woman died in a Virginia bus crash on May 29.
The victims include Dmitri Doncev, 45; Ecaterina Doncev, 44; their children Emily, 13, and Mark, 7; and Priscilla Mafalda, 25.
Bus driver Jing S. Dong faces two counts of involuntary manslaughter, with more charges possible according to authorities.

title: Connor Wong’s 3-RBI night helped power Red Sox win, and it couldn’t come at a better time for him individually
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Connor Wong drove in three runs helping the Red Sox secure a win against Cleveland.
Wong's performance comes as he's positioned lower in catcher ranking due to Mickey Gasper's rise.
Despite a home run being overturned, Wong's contributions included a crucial double and two late RBIs.

title: Sonny Gray continues to be great addition to Red Sox rotation, earns 6th win vs. Guardians
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Sonny Gray earned his sixth win with the Red Sox, pitching six innings in a 9-1 victory over the Guardians.
Gray's performance included allowing one run, four hits, and striking out seven, lowering his ERA to 3.06.
The Red Sox have a 7-3 record in Gray's starts, as he proves a strong addition amidst injuries in the rotation.

title: Here’s the full lineup of athletes and celebrities involved in Drake Maye’s charity softball game
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Drake Maye's charity softball game will be held at Polar Park in Worcester on Sunday.
Notable participants include Julian Edelman, Zdeno Chara, and comedians Matt Rife and Dave Portnoy.
The event aims to raise funds for the MayeDay foundation, supporting children and families facing hardship.

title: Potential A.J. Brown Patriots-Eagles trade reportedly has ‘framework in place’
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: A.J. Brown trade to Patriots from Eagles reportedly has a framework ready, per Albert Breer.
Eagles seek a first-round pick in exchange, but Patriots hesitate to part with a 2027 first-rounder.
Trade expected post-June 1 due to cap implications, reducing Eagles' cap hit to $16 million.

title: Did you hear it? Here’s what we know about a big boom heard around Mass.
author: Heather Alterisio
bullets: A loud boom heard across Greater Boston on Saturday was likely caused by a bolide meteor, experts suggest.
Meteorologists ruled out an earthquake, indicating the meteor's reentry created the thunderous sonic boom.
Massachusetts officials reported no emergency incidents related to the boom, despite numerous 911 calls in the area.

title: Brayan Bello excels in bulk relief, but opener melts in Red Sox’ 4-3 loss to Guardians
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Tyler Samaniego allowed four runs in the first inning in his opener debut, contributing to the Red Sox's 4-3 loss to the Guardians.
Brayan Bello excelled in bulk relief, pitching seven scoreless innings with five strikeouts, despite the loss.
Red Sox fell to 23-33, losing six of their last seven games and remaining last in the AL East.

title: Giannis Antetokounmpo praises TD Garden environment amid trade rumors
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo praised Boston Celtics fans, calling TD Garden a passionate environment for regular season games.
Antetokounmpo's comments come amid trade rumors linking him to both the Boston Celtics and Miami Heat this offseason.
Speculation continues over a possible trade, involving Jaylen Brown, as Celtics consider moves for Antetokounmpo.

title: Harvard ‘Senior Sunrise’ cut short by cops
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Police cleared Harvard's annual Senior Sunrise event on Weeks Footbridge due to large crowds and swimming attempts.
Massachusetts State Police, along with Cambridge and Harvard University Police, responded to manage the crowd issue.
The Senior Sunrise tradition occurs after commencement, with Harvard's Class of 2026 recently addressed by Conan O'Brien.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair' is streaming on Peacock, featuring Uma Thurman's iconic performance.
'The Truman Show' with Jim Carrey is available on Paramount+ and YouTube, exploring themes of reality TV.
'The Four Seasons' Season 2, starring Tina Fey, is now streaming on Netflix with a more refined tone.
